tools.name: analyze_scam
tools.description: Analyze a suspicious message, email, text, or social media post for scam indicators. Paste or describe the suspicious content as text. Returns risk level, scam type, red flags, and recommended actions.

tools.name: check_entity
tools.description: Check if a domain, phone number, email, or other identifier has been reported as a scam. Returns risk level, trust score, number of reports, and associated scam types.
